event_info: bit of swing for Vaibhav. Pitches around middle and leg; nips away; Head has a look and lets it pass
uhhh! Swing and bounce this time. Shortens the length; lands it around leg and seams away; Head has a loose waft and is beaten on the outside-edge. Good carry through to Raghuvanshi

once again goes past the outside-edge. Back of a length; in the channel around off; Head stays rooted to the crease and has a tentative poke; lucky not to edge it. Vaibhav left with his hands on his head..
slanting away from the left-hander; Head throws his bat and slashes it towards deep backward point
back of a length close to off; Abhishek stands tall and knocks it to point; slight fumble by Anukul and it allows Abhishek to get off the mark

Head ends the over with a boundary. Vaibhav became predictable with his length. Head was waiting for the shortish length; goes on one leg and whips it in front of square; beats mid-wicket and the ball races away
fullish delivery on leg; Abhishek flicks in front of square and Rinku keeps it to a single

that's a gimme from Muzarabani. Short and angling across; ample width on offer and Head is not missing out; cracks it in front of square and the ball pierces the packed off-side ring. Not off the middle but enough for it to race away
hat-trick of fours for Head. Once again Muzarabani offers space for Head to free his hands; he goes up and over the off-side field; clears the inner ring and there's no stopping that
slower ball at the stumps; Head waits and guides it to deep backward point
short of length close to off; Abhishek gets behind the line and defends it back

there he goes. First six of the night. And it comes off Abhishek's willow. Short delivery and it comes on nicely; Abhishek hangs back and nails the pull in front of square. He took on the longer square boundary and cleared it with ease

Rahane does not bother to chase. Angled across; but Head stays leg-side and gives himself the room to open his hands; thrashes it through extra cover and another mistimed shot that races across the turf
very full delivery on off; Head makes a bit of room and squeezes the drive to extra cover
high and all the way! Sunrisers are on the charge. Vaibhav angles it in; lands it right in Head's arc and there's no missing out; lofted through the line and sends it sailing over the sightscreen
back to back sixes. This is a poor delivery. Vaibhav tries to target the pads but offers a freebie down leg; Head backs away and whips it backward of square leg. 65 meter six..

now through the off-side. Vaibhav is leaking on both the sides. The attempted yorker goes wrong - full toss outside off; Head reaches and opens the bat face to slice it over backward point. No one in the deep to stop that..
tries to get away with a bouncer; but too short and too high; Head can't connect with the ramp and the square leg umpire signals a wide for height. How much will the extra ball cost?
that's better. Short and follows a backing away Head; cramps him for room and the upper cut can't be met; the ball flies over the top-edge. Big over - 21 runs
tossed up around off; Abhishek gently knocks it back to Narine
keeps it around leg; not much room on offer; Abhishek stays leg-side and knocks it to cover
flighted and drifting across leg; Abhishek nudges it through mid-wicket
same line for Head - down leg and no room; Head misses the flick and the ball deflects off the pad to short fine

dropped! Tough chance and Rahane can't hang on. He gets fingertips. Head comes down the track; stays leg-side and looks to go down the ground; but the ball spins away and catches the outer half; skies over extra cover and Rahane backtracks; puts in the dive but can't cling on
flatter delivery at the stumps; Head stays back and eases it to extra cover
he's greeted with a six. Flighted delivery on leg; Abhishek stays leg-side and has the space to extend his hands; clean swing of the bat and the ball sails over long-on
seam-up quick delivery; Abhishek opens the bat face and guides it to short third
six more.. Chakaravarthy goes fast and short; 108.8ks and the ball skids on; Abhishek is waiting on the back foot - nails the pull flat and all the way over long-on. Pressure on Chakaravarthy..
now a boundary. Overpitched outside off and Abhishek does not miss out; he bends the back knee and pumps it over extra cover; one bounce and over the ropes
tries to keep it away from Abhishek's range and sprays it outside off; wide called

nicely done! Abhishek shuffles across expecting Chakaravarthy to bowl outside off; the length is short and he does not overhit the cut; opens the bat face and splits the two fielders in the point region with precision
massive over - 25 runs. Almost a repeat of the previous boundary. Short and outside off; Abhishek moves across and opens the bat face; slices the cut square and the fielders don't bother to chase it

not off the middle but in the gap and four more.. Back of a length delivery; Head makes room and does not quite time the cut; but he hits it in front of square and wide of extra cover. And once the ball passes the infield at Eden then there's no point chasing it
full and outside off; Head tries his best to reach but can't; wide signalled

this is what happens when you come within his range. Kartik goes for an off-pace delivery; 117ks off-cutter but comes on nicely; Head had the width and he pumps it flat over deep extra cover. This is absolute carnage..
that's more like - 145.8ks back of a length delivery; right at Head and he defends it to the off-side

ball_event: out Caught by Cameron Green!! Finally Eden Garden finds its voice. Loud cheer as Green hangs on. The partnership has been broken. Kartik is pumped. Much needed wicket for the home side. 142.2ks back of a length delivery
event_info: angled across the left-hander; Head tries to fetch the flat-batted shot and loses his grip; the bottom hand comes off the bat handle; he gets the shot off the cue-end and the ball goes straight up; Green backtracks from mid-on and hangs on safely. A nice little cameo from Head comes to an end. Travis Head c Cameron Green b Kartik Tyagi 46(21) [4s-6 6s-3]
low full toss on off; Kishan drives to extra cover and a half stop allows the pair to cross over comfortably
147ks full and angled across; Abhishek opens the bat face and guides it towards deep backward point
87.9ks slower and drifting across; Abhishek knocks it wide of cover and crosses over
92.4ks flatter and at the stumps; Kishan moves across and clips it to deep mid-wicket

bad delivery and put away. Very small margin for error. 90ks short of length and angling away; Abhishek had the width and he flays it over extra cover. There's a valiant dive in the deep by Anukul but he's nowhere close to stopping that
slower and the ball stops a bit; Abhishek is early into the push and checks his shot; angles it to backward point
once again Narine misses his line and is made to pay. 94.6ks short and around leg; Abhishek swivels around in the crease and pulls it high towards deep square leg. He gets the distance as well..
short and drifting away; Abhishek opens the bat face and slices it backward of point; couple more
143.3ks good length ball angled across; Kishan throws his bat and is beaten on the outside-edge. Not much bounce on this delivery as it barely carries to Raghuvanshi

the off-pace delivery is not working for Kartik. He went for runs against Head as well. 117.3ks slower ball bowled into the surface; sits up nicely and Kishan nails the pull in front of square; splits the two fielders in the deep perfectly
nicely done! 146.2ks very full and outside off; close to yorker length; Kishan bends down and reaches it; squeezes it to the right of backward point and beats the diving fielder

hat-trick of fours. This was touch and go. Full pitcher around off; Kishan wanted to go over mid-off as the fielder was inside the ring; does not quite middle it but gets enough to evade the leaping fielder
118ks slower short of length delivery; Kishan looks to pull and chops it onto the pads; luckily the ball drops dead near his feet instead of rolling back onto the stumps
145.1ks back of a length angled across; Kishan tries to run it down to third man and is beaten o the outside-edge
starts with a slower ball - 110.1ks leg-lined delivery; Abhishek clips it over the mid-wicket region

ball_event: out Caught by Rinku Singh!! Gone! Well-judged catch by Rinku. Muzarabani comes back and gets the big wicket of Kishan. This was not quite a wicket-taking delivery - short and angled across
event_info: plenty of width on offer and Kishan goes hard on the cut; slashes it in front of square and picks out Rinku at sweeper cover. He steadies himself just inside the rope and takes it over his head. Wickets are the only way KKR are going to stop this SRH batting line-up. Ishan Kishan c Rinku Singh b Blessing Muzarabani 14(9) [4s-3]
134ks angling in around the hips; Klaasen gloves the pull backward of square leg

ball_event: out Caught by Varun Chakaravarthy!! Loud cheer goes around Eden Garden. Second wicket in the over. Muzarabani is doing the job for KKR. Kishan and Abhishek both back in the hut. The home side are right back in the game and the jubilation is quite evident. 112ks slower short of length delivery
event_info: right at the batter and Abhishek did not have much space to play the pull; but he still manages to hit it flat towards deep square leg. The ball was dying on Varun but he does extremely well. For someone who is not known for his fielding; this is a terrific catch - he quickly moves to his right; bends down low and scoops it centimeters above the ground. No fifty for Abhishek as well. Abhishek Sharma c Varun Chakaravarthy b Blessing Muzarabani 48(21) [4s-4 6s-4]
FOUR; that's a poor delivery. Strays down leg; Verma misses the glance and the ball deflects off the thigh pad; beats Angkrish Raghuvanshi and runs away to the fence

another slower ball that Muzarabani slips down leg; Verma can't meet with the glance and the ball does not brush anything on the way to the keeper. The umpire thought there was a touch and hence didn't signal a wide; but he had to change his decision
104.5ks off-pace delivery; Verma nudges it to square leg and gets off the mark
flatter and sliding in; Verma clears his front leg and misses the flick; struck on the back pad but it was missing leg-stump

ball_event: out Caught by Rinku Singh!! Three wickets in quick time. Kolkata Knight Riders are right back in the contest. Anukul was held back because of the left-handers at the crease. But with two right-handers out
event_info: he was brought in and he strikes with his second ball. He throws it up outside off and makes Verma reach for the big shot; not quite off the middle and Rinku runs to his left near long-off to complete the catch. He made that catch look easy. Aniket Verma c Rinku Singh b Anukul Roy 1(4)
92.9ks attacks the stumps; Reddy tucks it to square leg
93.8ks flatter delivery around off; Klaasen eases it to long-off
85.7ks short and outside off; Reddy cracks it square on the off-side
88.1ks flighted but short in length; Klaasen cuts it in front of square and Vaibhav fumbles in the deep; concedes the extra run
96ks drifting into middle and leg; Reddy clips it backward of square
94.6ks googly around off; Klaasen eases it to long-on
96.4ks wrong 'un close to off; Reddy tucks it through mid-wicket
quicker and at the stumps; Klaasen is rushed into bringing his bat down; stabs it to the right of Chakaravarthy
fullish delivery around off; Reddy drives it down to long-off
short and bowled into the wicket; Klaasen knocks it to long-on
makes room and Anukul follows him; clipped wide of long-on and the pair scamper back for the second
90.9ks fired outside off; not within the guideline and Klaasen lets it pass
very similar to the previous delivery and Klaasen leaves; but this is within the marker. No wide call
fired into the blockhole; Klaasen brings his bat down and jams it back to Anukul
short and outside off; Klaasen slaps it in front of square and Reddy races back for the second
tries that wide line outside off; but can't keep it within the tramline; another wide
93.4ks darted into yorker length; Klaasen digs it out to long-on

boundary after a while. Runs were coming in ones and twos; but Anukul throws one up outside off for Reddy and he accepts the invitation; creams the drive in front of square and gives the sweeper no chance
just over Rahane. 85ks off-break that follows a backing away Klaasen; he still goes through the big shot; flays it over cover and beats Rahane leaps inside the ring
short and turning in; Klaasen pulls to deep backward square
95.1ks fullish delivery around off; Reddy eases it to long-on
off-break that ends up on the pads; Klaasen clips it to deep square leg and scampers back for the second
90.4ks short and around off; Klaasen makes room and cracks it to sweeper cover
85.3ks flighted and turns in; Reddy prods forward and ekes out an inside-edge onto the pad
102.1ks off-cutter outside off; Klaasen looks to cut and misses. The ball sneaks under the bat
attempted yorker ends up as a low full toss. Klaasen toe ends the drive to wide long-on
slower short delivery well outside off; Nitish had to wait and cuts it wide of sweeper cover. Tyagi runs to his right; slides and saves two
half-volley outside off; Nitish drives it to sweeper cover. His bat turns as he makes contact with the bat
yorker near the tramline outside off. Klaasen jams it out to point
another good slower delivery from Muzarabani. Was banged in short well outside off. Nitish had to reach out for the ball and flat bats it down to long-on
quicker short delivery on off; Nitish gets low to pick the length and pulls it to deep mid-wicket
Klaasen jumps in disappointment as he misses out on a rank long hop from Narine. Pulls it down to long-on
rare from Rahane. Moves to his left; slides and lets the ball sneak under. This shouldn't have been more than a single. Nitish cuts to cover and collects four
flatter on middle; tucked to vacant mid-wicket region
second boundary off the over. Was a risky one. Klaasen plants his front foot across a long way and sweeps the ball fine from middle stump. He would have been in trouble had he missed
50-run stand comes up with a poor effort on the field at point. Was cut to point; the fielder gives away an over throw at the bowler's end; where there was no back up
short delivery well outside off; Nitish drags the pull to long-on
143.7ks yorker on off; Klaasen gets his bat down in time and digs it out to long-on
another attempted yorker that ends up as a low full toss. Nitish drives it along the ground to sweeper cover
half-volley outside off; driven straight to sweeper cover
this is good bowling from Kartik Tyagi. Keeps it tight on middle stump with an attempted yorker. Nitish picks it full and can only manage to hit it down to long-on
back of a length delivery well outside the tramline. Wided
115.8ks slower short delivery outside off. Mistimed pull to mid-wicket
Vaibhav follows Klaasen with a short delivery. Klaasen isn't in a great position as he goes for the pull. On the bounce to deep mid-wicket
in the air and just short of long-on fielder. Nitish looks to go down the ground. Gets it off the toe end of the blade and on the bounce to the fielder
yorker on middle; Klaasen keeps it out by getting bat down in time
Vaibhav follows Klaasen yet again. This time with a low full toss. Klaasen wrists it to deep mid-wicket
slower bumper just above Nitish's attempted pull
bang. Right in the slot and asking for trouble. Nitish clears his front foot and smokes it straight down the ground. That sailed over the sightscreen for a maximum
attempted reverse scoop ends up dangerously close to the off-stump. How did that even miss? Klaasen isn't happy with himself as he fails to execute the shot
this time he gets enough bat. Gets much lower than the previous ball. Picks the full delivery and deposits it over third man fence
just short of a yorker. Knocked down to long-on
Kartik Tyagi loses his line. Sprays it down the leg. All Nitish had to do was to get bat on ball. He gets plenty and collects four down at fine leg
back-to-back boundaries for Nitish. High full toss from Tyagi this time. Nitish clears his leg and slogs it to cow corner. Between two fielders at long-on and mid-wicket

dropped at deep mid-wicket. Nitish heaves the full toss and picks Varun; who is right on the boundary. He had to run forward and fails to catch it cleanly. Nitish loses the review on the high full toss check

ball_event: out Caught by Varun Chakaravarthy!! Good knock comes to an end. Slower short delivery outside off
event_info: Nitish picks the fielder to perfection on the upper cut. Didn't get the timing right as there was no pace on the ball; got a lot of elevation and Varun at deep point takes a good catch. Nitish Reddy c Varun Chakaravarthy b Vaibhav Arora 39(24) [4s-4 6s-1]

ball_event: out Bowled!! Vaibhav Arora on a hat-trick. This time he picks the wicket with a full delivery. Was quick and aimed at the pads. The ball ricochets off the pad and shatters the stumps. Salil tries to flick the full delivery and misses. Has to walk back for a golden duck. Salil Arora b Vaibhav Arora 0(1)
event_info: out Bowled!! Vaibhav Arora on a hat-trick. This time he picks the wicket with a full delivery. Was quick and aimed at the pads. The ball ricochets off the pad and shatters the stumps. Salil tries to flick the full delivery and misses. Has to walk back for a golden duck. Salil Arora b Vaibhav Arora 0(1)
comes round the wicket and sprays it well down leg. Wide called. Vaibhav is still on a hat-trick
goes for the yorker. Harsh is ready and flicks it to deep square leg
slower short delivery at the badge. Klaasen gets on top of the bounce and pulls it along the ground. Rolled his wrists to keep the ball down
that's nicely played. Got in position quickly. Moves across his stumps and scoops the full delivery over short fine. Raced away for four
swung away on the on-side. Picks up yet another boundary. Full on the pads; Harsh flicks it in the air. There is no fielder in the deep at square leg and Harsh Dubey collects four more
attempted slower delivery well outside off; wide called

two fielders converge under a skier and both the fielders don't go for the catch. Klaasen clears his front foot and toe-ends the ball straight up in the air down the ground. Pandey and Anukul get close; but lack of communication costing them
down the ground. Klaasen flat-bats the length delivery straight back over the non-striker's head. That went like a bullet to the fence

50 for Klaasen. Not a great delivery from Muzarabani. Full toss outside off; Klaasen gets across and wrists it past backward square leg. There was no fielder in the deep and Klaasen took advantage of that. This is a fine knock from Klaasen; steadied the ship as SRH lost three wickets in succession and is now taking them to a competitive total

ball_event: out Caught by Ramandeep Singh!! Klaasen departs trying to fetch another boundary. Moves a long way across to pick the slower full delivery from outside off. Doesn't come anywhere near the middle. The ball skies around deep mid-wicket and Ramandeep settles under the ball to take a fine catch. Heinrich Klaasen c Ramandeep Singh b Blessing Muzarabani 52(35) [4s-4 6s-1]
event_info: out Caught by Ramandeep Singh!! Klaasen departs trying to fetch another boundary. Moves a long way across to pick the slower full delivery from outside off. Doesn't come anywhere near the middle. The ball skies around deep mid-wicket and Ramandeep settles under the ball to take a fine catch. Heinrich Klaasen c Ramandeep Singh b Blessing Muzarabani 52(35) [4s-4 6s-1]
Shivang gets off the mark with a boundary. Opens the bat face and slashes it behind square on the off-side

ball_event: out Caught by Ajinkya Rahane!! Blessing Muzarabani finishes with a four-fer after giving away 16 runs in his first over. Slower short delivery outside off
event_info: Shivang reaches out for the ball and cuts it straight to Rahane at extra cover; who takes the catch over his head. Shivang Kumar c Ajinkya Rahane b Blessing Muzarabani 4(2) [4s-1]
shortish length delivery outside off; Rahane cuts it to deep point and gets off the mark with a single
Finn Allen goes for it straightaway. Wasn't a bad ball. He stands tall and smokes the length delivery through covers. Doesn't bother to keep it down
touch short and has been dispatched. Allen pulls it wide of deep mid-wicket. This was all power from the right-hander. Fielder in the deep had no chance of cutting that
this is some batting. Full delivery on middle; Allen clears his front foot and thumps it over he bowler's head. Was so still when he hit that
another big hit. He is toying with the bowler. Picks the short delivery early and pulls it high and handsome over mid-wicket. Sailed deep into the stands
make that 25 off the first over. KKR and Finn Allen are off to a flier. Short and wide outside off; cut through point region
Rahane hands over the strike to Finn Allen with a tuck to mid-wicket
Harsh Dubey goes for the yorker. Falls short and ends up as a slot ball on off. Finn Allen chips it over mid-off and gets his fourth boundary

ball_event: out Caught&Bowled!! Taken. What a huge moment this is. Brave stuff from Harsh Dubey. Goes for the tossed up delivery on middle
event_info: the ball curves in and takes the inner half of the blade of Finn Allen. He was looking to go over cover. Came at a good pace towards Harsh; who did well to keep his eyes on the ball and take a good return catch. Finn Allen c and b Harsh Dubey 28(7) [4s-4 6s-2]
flatter on off; pushed to the off-side
driven down to long-off to a fuller length delivery
pushed through down the leg. Ajinkya goes for the sweep and misses. Ishan can't collect cleanly

loud shout for LBW! SRH decide against the review. Was given notout on-field. Probably was sliding down leg. Raghuvanshi looks to sweep and misses. Is pinged on the front pad but the line was slipping down. Replays show it was missing leg-stump
shortish length outside off; cut to the right of cover-point
tossed up on middle; Raghuvanshi gets a gift and he accepts it gleefully. Gets to the pitch of the ball and nails it over long-on for a maximum
flatter outside off; driven past cover
84ks delivery outside off; pushed back to Abhishek
touch shorter in length on middle and leg; Rahane shuffles across and pulls it to short fine
Raghuvanshi plants his front foot across and picks the length well. Reaches out for the ball and sweeps it over short fine. Few bounces and over the fence she goes
arm-ball on middle; Rahane gets a thick inside edge down to deep mid-wicket
fired in on off; Raghuvanshi drops it in front of cover for a quick single. 50 up for KKR in just 20 balls
too full on middle; Rahane makes room and drills it straight back to the bowler. Harsh gets a hand; but can't stop it cleanly as it was hit with some power
good shot. Makes room and picks the line from middle stump and goes inside out over cover. Long-off has no chance of cutting that
driven past cover for a run
flatter into the pads; tucked to vacant mid-wicket
cross batted shot from Rahane. Has to drag the short delivery from well outside off and hits it wide of mid-on
cutter angling across the right-hander; Raghuvanshi defends it to point
Raghuvanshi helps it on its way. Short delivery down the leg; Raghuvanshi pulls it wide of deep square leg. Nitish puts in a desperate dive; but can't stop the ball from racing away
Raghuvanshi has outplayed the bowler here. Picks the short delivery from middle stump by giving himself room and cuts it late past backward point. Back-to-back boundaries for Raghuvanshi
on the length at middle stump; tucked to mid-wicket

ball_event: out Caught by Eshan Malinga!! Rahane makes his way back. This is the fifth time in nine innings that Jaydev Unadkat has got him. Slower delivery on middle
event_info: Rahane doesn't get the room he was looking for. Gets cramped and only manages to sky it to deep mid-wicket. Unadkat pleads the fielder to run towards the ball and take the catch. Malinga did that and puts in a dive to get under the ball to take a clean catch. Ajinkya Rahane c Eshan Malinga b Jaydev Unadkat 8(10)
sprayed down the leg; wide called
length delivery on middle; pushed down to long-on
short delivery well over the batter. Wide called for height. Malinga doesn't think so as Green came down the track. SRH decide not to review
length delivery on middle; Green walks down the pitch and knocks it to long-on
another wide for height. Banged in short well outside off. Raghuvanshi tries to reach out with an upper cut. Can't get anywhere close

Raghuvanshi wasn't in a good position to play the shot. He was in two minds; whether to pull of tuck. He misses and is hit on the thigh pad. Raghuvanshi shakes it off and is ready to face the next delivery
quick single towards point. Raghuvanshi drops it to right of the fielder and sets off. Makes it to the other end in time
Green knocks it back. Raghuvanshi couldn't get his bat out of the way. The ball lobs to the bowler as Raghuvanshi looks to steal a run. They both decide against it and get away with it

ball_event: out Cameron Green Run Out!! They say you never run of a misfield or fumble and this is exactly why. Raghuvanshi hits it straight back to Malinga
event_info: who sticks his boot out and half stops. Green first ensures he's back in the crease; but then sees Raghuvanshi take a start and decides to go for the single. Raghuvanshi can't spot where the ball has gone and he pauses; by which time Green was already halfway down the pitch; so he had no option but go for the run. The ball rolls towards the stump at the bowler's end. Malinga runs back; picks up the ball and lights up the stumps. Raghuvanshi was the one who started walking back to the pavilion as it looked like he had crossed Green but he's made to wait by the fourth umpire near the boundary rope. The third umpire has a look and sees that both batters are in the same line on the opposite side of the pitch; so Green is the one given out. Raghuvanshi was extremely unhappy as he walking back to the dugout; but he gets to go back while a disappointed Green makes his way back to the pavilion. Cameron Green run out (Eshan Malinga) 2(2)
flat ball darted in; beats Rinku's glance to hit on the pad
quicker one; Rinku shapes to pull and misses. There's an appeal for lbw but that's heading down leg
91.2kph; full delivery; driven down to long-on
googly; Angkrish Raghuvanshi looks to drive and gets beaten on the outside edge. There's a stumping appeal sent upstairs. He's safe as the back leg is inside the crease
92.5kph; fraction short; Raghuvanshi rocks back to punch and backward point makes a diving stop

in the air and safe ! 91.4kph; full and outside off; Raghuvanshi throws his bat at it and ends up slicing it over the leaping backward point fielder off the outside edge. A streaky boundary to end a good over from the debutant
over the wicket; extra bounce for Unadkat. Not enough room to be cutting and the short of length ball beats the outside edge
132.1kph; Rinku Singh gives the charge to the bowler. Shimmies down and moves leg-side. He's hurried into his shot as he throws his arms at it. Miscues over cover for a single

cracking shot! Back of a length with a bit of width on offer. Angkrish Raghuvanshi stands tall and makes excellent contact as he punches. NKR dives to his left after running across from deep cover but he can't prevent the boundary
opens the bat-face and steers this length ball fine of third man. Shivang dives to his left to stop the boundary; super effort
on a length and just outside off; forced through the covers
111.6kph; slower ball bouncer; Rinku Singh pulls and gets a top-edge that falls in the vacant square leg region
googly following a backing away batter; Rinku chops it to point
92.6kph; width on offer; Angkrish Raghuvanshi cuts hard through backward point off the back foot. Harsh over-runs to his left in the deep and makes a mess of it. Ishan isn't happy onebit

there's an appeal for caught behind; turned down by the umpire. SRH review. Googly from Shivang; not too wide; Angkrish goes on the back foot to cut and misses. It was Ishan Kishan who decided to review it
another misfield! Length ball around off; Angkrish Raghuvanshi pushes at and outside-halves it to the right of Payne at short third man. The fielder slips and lets the ball go through

third misfield in this over! Shivang Kumar is rightly unhappy. Full delivery and Rinku chips it over extra cover. NKR over-runs to his left and he slips as he tries to recover. He wears a smile does the fielder but spare a thought for the bowler
quicker; shorter and flatter; punched to extra cover. 12 runs off the over despite bowling well
back-to-back fifties for Angkrish Raghuvanshi! Slower ball into the deck from round the wicket; Angkrish Raghuvanshi pulls through midwicket
109.8kph; over the wicket; slower ball bouncer; Rinku pulls to the left of long-on where Klaasen makes a tumbling stop
108.6kph; pace off again; on a length and wide of off; cut to deep point
pats this length ball to backward point and sets off for a quick single. The fielder has a shy at the keeper's end and misses the target
slow and short; Rinku Singh spots it early; stands tall; waits and slams the pull through midwicket. Bullets away to the fence
104.9kph; width on offer; Rinku cuts to deep backward point and keeps the strike
93.8kph; Rinku backs away to cut this length ball; finds backward point
93.1kph; tossed up and full; Rinku stays leg-side of the ball; gets under it and drives hard uppishly through wide mid-off. Excellent placement
backs away to cut; outside-edges to the left of short third man who makes a diving stop
moves leg-side and drives this full delivery to long-off
94.1kph; fraction short from Shivang Kumar and gets punished. Rinku Singh backs away; exposes the stumps in the process but he cuts well in front of backward point

ball_event: out Angkrish Raghuvanshi Run Out!! Second run-out of the innings. Rinku Singh isn't happy with Angkrish Raghuvanshi even though it's the former's fault. Rinku makes room to cut
event_info: the ball goes to the left of backward point. Rinku takes off for a single; watches the ball and then turns around as the fielder picks up the ball. Angkrish Raghuvanshi is almost halfway down by the time he notices his partner turn his back on him. A pretty accurate throw to the bowler from Malinga and Shivang completes the formalities. Angkrish was batting superbly and his innings comes to an end. Angkrish Raghuvanshi run out (Eshan Malinga/Shivang Kumar) 52(29) [4s-6 6s-2]
length ball from round the wicket; holds its line outside off and beats the tentative outside edge of Anukul

ball_event: out Caught by Ishan Kishan!! Edged and gone! Good length ball around the fourth-fifth stump zone outside off. Anukul
event_info: with no feet movement - looks to run it down to third man. Gets it too fine to his liking as he only manages an outside edge. Easy grab for the keeper and Anukul departs for a duck. KKR have now lost half their side. Anukul Roy c Ishan Kishan b Nitish Reddy 0(2)
a good-looking shot for a single. Short ball; hip high and Ramandeep Singh swivels to pull it through square leg
back of a length; Rinku taps it towards cover-point with soft hands
length ball outside off; punched to backward point
shortened length outside off. Ramandeep walks across to stab it and ends up splicing it towards mid-off who takes it on the bounce
fullish ball just outside off; Ramandeep gets low and reverse-sweeps hard. Aerial and in the gap between short third man and backward point
89.6kph; slower googly on a short of length; worked into the midwicket pocket. Ramandeep runs the first run hard but has to settle for a single
full on the stumps; Rinku stays leg-side of the ball to push it to cover-point
93kph; wrong 'un outside off; cut to deep backward point off the back foot
shot! In-drifting flighted delivery that's full in length. Rinku moves leg-side; clears his front leg and lofts it inside-out over deep extra cover. Incredible shot
googly; Rinku chops it to cover. Shivang finishes with 0/41 on IPL debut
119.4kph; round the wicket; off-speed length ball outside off; chopped to backward point
slower ball on leg; turned to deep square leg
back of a length; Ramandeep stands tall to flat-bat it and splices it towards the forward-running extra cover fielder

ball_event: out Caught by Jaydev Unadkat!! Is that the killer blow? 117kph
event_info: slower ball outside off; not sure if Rinku Singh picked it. Crouches a bit and slashes hard on seeing the width. All he manages is an outside edge that goes straight into the hands of Unadkat at shot third man. Second wicket for Nitish who's been on the money. Rinku Singh c Jaydev Unadkat b Nitish Reddy 35(25) [4s-4 6s-1]
Narine gets off the mark with a maximum! Short ball at 134.6kph; Narine stands tall; swivels and pulls it handsomely over deep midwicket for an 86m six

115.3kph; slower ball; full on middle; Narine clears his front leg to bludgeon it over long-on. Harsh Dubey; just in front of the boundary rope; jumps to try and take an overhead catch. He may have got fingertips on it. Oh; in fact; more than fingertips. He's palmed it over the rope. A very tough chance though
137.9kph; short ball; Ramandeep hurriedly pulls and miscues to square leg

105.2kph; slower ball well outside off; Narine shoulders arms and that's not been wided. The left-handed batter signals 'T' to review it. He hardly moved there and the ball is outside the guideline. So; the onfield call gets overturned. Successful review
107kph; another pace off ball but this is further wide from Malinga. Nothing doing from Narine
pace off and wide of off; Narine slashes and misses. Close to the tramline; wide not given and Narine doesn't chance a review on this occasion

ball_event: out Caught by Aniket Verma!! Holes out! 110.8kph
event_info: slow; full and in the slot; Narine clears his front leg to loft it over long-on. He picks the change of pace and makes decent contact but doesn't get the necessary elevation on it. Aniket jumps and takes a good overhead catch at long-on. KKR lose their 7th wicket. Sunil Narine c Aniket Verma b Eshan Malinga 12(4) [6s-2]
136.8kph; rib-tickler; Kartik Tyagi glances it fine. No chance for the short fine leg fielder to stop that

1 run; to fine leg; 137.7kph; in-angling bouncer; Tyagi is late to duck and the ball is nowhere close to the ball. Came a lot quicker than he anticipates. Hits the helmet and goes to fine leg. Good to see Tyagi sporting a smile. He passes the concussion test and is fine to resume

ball_event: out Caught by Jaydev Unadkat!! Another one bites the dust! 108.3kph
event_info: slower ball on a length outside off. Ramandeep hangs back to cut and hits it straight to Unadkat at backward point. Ramandeep Singh c Jaydev Unadkat b Eshan Malinga 10(9) [4s-1]
108.9kph; slower ball from round the wicket; not picked by the batter. Kartik Tyagi gets forward to work it into the leg-side and is beaten on the outside edge
slower ball into the deck; Kartik Tyagi backs away and pulls it down to long-on
130.5kph; good length outside off; beats the poking outside edge of Vaibhav Arora
slower ball; Vaibhav Arora defends it into the off-side and sets off for a quick single

ball_event: out Caught by Ishan Kishan!! Kartik Tyagi has been given out and he reviews. 127.9kph
event_info: full outside off; Tyagi stays in his crease to flick and may have got an inside edge. Yes; UltraEdge confirms the same with a big spike. There were two reviews left and hence Tyagi sent it upstairs. He probably knew that he got a nick. Kartik Tyagi c Ishan Kishan b Jaydev Unadkat 5(5) [4s-1]

ball_event: out Bowled!! SRH win by 65 runs! 130.5kph
event_info: Unadkat bowls it full from round the wicket. Varun Chakaravarthy; with cemented feet; looks to ease it through the off-side and ends up deflecting it onto the stumps via an inside edge. Varun Chakaravarthy b Jaydev Unadkat 0(1)
